{
  "current_life_events": "My mother, who has been my main support since my chronic illness diagnosis, suffered a stroke last week and is now partially paralyzed. I have had to step in as her primary caregiver while also managing my own health appointments and a tight freelance writing deadline.",
  "mental_state": "I feel emotionally drained and constantly on edge, worried about both my mother’s recovery and my own health stability.",
  "mood": "exhausted and anxious",
  "emotions": ["anxious", "overwhelmed", "guilty"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["caregiver_stress", "health_anxiety"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The recent stroke and the sudden increase in caregiving responsibilities, combined with my own health concerns, have made these stressors immediate and urgent."
}

  "current_life_events": "The user is juggling a looming manuscript deadline while managing a new medication regimen for their chronic illness. }
